title: ConfigLib TXF
description: A powerful & lightweight config library for Minecraft mods
body:
ConfigLib TXF mod

A powerful & lightweight config library for Minecraft mods Main features: Automatic Config Screen: A ready-to-use GUI with tabs, categories, and a reset button on every field JSON5 Config Files: Human-friendly config files with auto-generated comments showing defaults, ranges, and allowed values Rich Widgets: Toggles, sliders, cycle buttons, color picker, file/directory chooser, and item/block icon preview Real-Time Editing: Changes apply instantly while editing, with per-field validation (min/max, regex) and visual feedback Server Sync: Seamlessly syncs selected fields from server to clients in multiplayer, keeping gameplay consistent Multiple Configs: Split a mod's settings across several files with an automatic hub screen for navigation Full Translation Support: Every label, tooltip, tab, and enum value can be translated through the standard language files Fabric/Quilt dependencies: - Mod Menu mod (Optional) ### Dependency (Maven Central) ```groovy repositories { mavenCentral() } dependencies { // Fabric implementation 'io.github.jahirxtrap:configlibtxf:TAG-fabric' // Forge implementation 'io.github.jahirxtrap:configlibtxf:TAG-forge' // NeoForge implementation 'io.github.jahirxtrap:configlibtxf:TAG-neoforge' } ``` Replace `TAG` with the version you want (e.g. `26.1.2-2.0.0`). ### Usage ```java // initialize config TXFConfig.init(MODID, ModConfig.class); ```
